about.heading: About Me
about.sub_heading: Based in Dushanbe, passionate about engineering ultra-responsive, highly functional UI designs.
about.bio: Hello! I'm Rahmatsho Muhammad, a dedicated Frontend Engineer based in Dushanbe. I specialize in crafting high-end, responsive web applications with modular and solid architectural foundations. I value semantic clarity, fluid interactive craft, and highly organized code standards.
about.philosophy_val: Rigorous step-by-step feature assembly matched with thorough checkpoint verifications to guarantee clean design and performance integrity.
